chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1629 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA 8463/2018 3.For hearing of main case 25-05-2022 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Associate of Mr.Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Legal Advisor, SIDA-Respondents. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- We have perused the prayer clause and apparently the Petitioners are seeking a relief which is not permissible in law. Even otherwise, in Const. Petition No. D-1043 of 2018 (Re. Khadim Hussain Arain and others v. Province of Sindh and others), directions have been issued by this Court to remove all illegal pumping machines installed by the khatedars. In view of such position, instant Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
